label: Gen step scatterer
description: Abstract base for gen steps that scatter things across the map. Provides placement count, spacing, and validator fields shared by all scatterer subclasses.

count.label: Count
count.description: Fixed number of things to scatter. Use -1 to derive count from countPer10kCellsRange instead.

countPer10kCellsRange.label: Count per 10k cells range
countPer10kCellsRange.description: Random range of scatter instances per 10,000 map cells. Used when count is -1.

nearPlayerStart.label: Near player start
nearPlayerStart.description: When true, scatter positions are chosen near the player start spot.

nearMapCenter.label: Near map center
nearMapCenter.description: When true, scatter positions are chosen near the center of the map.

minSpacing.label: Min spacing
minSpacing.description: Minimum distance in cells between scatter instances.

spotMustBeStandable.label: Spot must be standable
spotMustBeStandable.description: When true, candidate scatter cells must be standable.

minDistToPlayerStart.label: Min dist to player start
minDistToPlayerStart.description: Minimum distance in cells from the player start spot.

minDistToPlayerStartPct.label: Min dist to player start pct
minDistToPlayerStartPct.description: Minimum distance to the player start as a fraction of the map's smaller dimension.

minEdgeDist.label: Min edge dist
minEdgeDist.description: Minimum distance in cells from the map edge.

minEdgeDistPct.label: Min edge dist pct
minEdgeDistPct.description: Minimum distance from the map edge as a fraction of the map's smaller dimension.

extraNoBuildEdgeDist.label: Extra no-build edge dist
extraNoBuildEdgeDist.description: Additional distance from the map edge added on top of the normal no-build border when checking placement.

validators.label: Validators
validators.description: Placement validators that must all pass for a candidate cell to be accepted.

fallbackValidators.label: Fallback validators
fallbackValidators.description: Alternative validators used when the primary validators fail to find any valid cell.

allowInWaterBiome.label: Allow in water biome
allowInWaterBiome.description: Whether this step runs on water-covered tiles.

allowFoggedPositions.label: Allow fogged positions
allowFoggedPositions.description: Whether scatter positions that are still fogged are valid.

allowRoofed.label: Allow roofed
allowRoofed.description: Whether scatter positions under a roof are valid.

onlyOnStartingMap.label: Only on starting map
onlyOnStartingMap.description: When true, this step is skipped on any map that is not the player's starting map.

minPollution.label: Min pollution
minPollution.description: Minimum tile pollution level required for this step to run.

allowMechanoidDatacoreReadOrLost.label: Allow mechanoid datacore read or lost
allowMechanoidDatacoreReadOrLost.description: When false, this step is skipped once a mechanoid datacore has been read or lost.

isJunk.label: Is junk
isJunk.description: When true, the scatter count is scaled by tile mutator junk density factors.

warnOnFail.label: Warn on fail
warnOnFail.description: Whether to log a warning when no valid scatter cell can be found.
